title: Daily exchange rates: Lookup tool
summary: This is a Bank of Canada utility interface for searching and downloading daily exchange rate data, not a research document or commentary. The page lists available currencies and explains the data publication schedule (by 16:30 ET each business day) but contains no analytical content, macro commentary, or policy-relevant findings.
key_points: Source is a data lookup utility tool, not a research or commentary document
Bank of Canada publishes daily average exchange rates once each business day by 16:30 ET
Rates are described as indicative only, obtained from averages of aggregated price quotes from financial institutions
Available currencies include CAD cross-rates against major currencies (USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, etc.)
No macro analysis, policy commentary, or research findings present in the source
why_it_matters: This page is a functional data access tool, not a source of macro catalysts or market structure insights. It provides raw exchange rate data but contains no analysis, interpretation, or policy commentary that would be relevant for a finance research archive.

issues_found: Source is a functional utility/data lookup interface, not research content
Contains no macro analysis, commentary, or policy-relevant findings
event_type correctly set to 'unknown' but this confirms unsuitability for archive
